arts.ttl: Ajax loan midfielder to Cardiff City
arts.sum: Ajax have sent midfielder Sivert Mannsverk on loan to Championship side Cardiff City until the end of the season. A year and a half ago, Ajax paid €6 million to sign the 22-year-old from Molde but he has only made 18 appearances for the club.
